title: Table inheritance (base SupportInheritance=Yes + derived Extends)
instruction: In the sandbox model, model a small table-inheritance hierarchy. Create: (1) a base table DemoVehicle with SupportInheritance=Yes and fields VehicleId (an EDT-backed str) and Make (str); (2) a derived table DemoTruck whose Extends property is set to DemoVehicle, adding a field PayloadKg (real). The derived table must inherit the base fields through inheritance rather than redeclaring them. Use get_knowledge(topic="table inheritance") to ground the SupportInheritance / Extends / InstanceRelationType discriminator pattern. Both tables must build clean.
